mxCell.value:
ti frame (PIL)
reward, positions

ti+1 action
(discrete 0-16)

Social Plasticity Module
Hebbian Social Graph

Social Plasticity Module
Hebbian Social Graph

Hebbian Update:
Δwij = η·mij·cij·(1-wij) - λ·wij

m(t) = tanh(β · reward)
cij = I(dist ≤ d) · gi · gj

Inputs (per step):
• positions (env)
• rewards (env)
• communications (agents)
• advantages (RL, optional)

Phase 1: log_only
Observe + record only

Phase 2: reward_shaping
r'i = ri + α · Σj wij · rj
→ modifies RL effective reward

Neighbour Bond Info
wij for previously
interacted agents
→ injected into beliefs

Social Plasticity Module
Hebbian Social Graph

Trajectory Buffer
(prompt, action_idx, log_prob,
value, reward, done)

1. Action Head weights
2. Value Head weights
3. LoRA adapter
